since_last: 63% of 89 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +6.14%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 63% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.74% · BTC -2.95% · Gold +0.63% · Nasdaq100 +1.60%. 63% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +6.14%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +6.14%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at -0.87%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMBA is the standout at +30.76%
cards.body: Leaders: AMBA +30.76%, AVAV +17.99%, CEVA +10.42%, KLAC +8.20%, VRT +8.00%. Laggards: DLR -5.02%, HON -4.16%, TTD -4.10%, PINS -3.98%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +3.40% at $169.77
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +3.40% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
